title: CEAT Tyres is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: CEAT Tyres is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
